reviews.comment:
Tradicional parador entre capital y junin, limpio, buena atención!, impecable!, si necesita parar es muy recomendable!!

(Translated by Google)
A traditional rest stop between the capital and Junin, clean, great service!, spotless!, highly recommended if you need to stop!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTMjgtM3VnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención de playeros, súper amables e informados del estado de la ruta. Baños limpios, mesas adentro y afuera en perfecto estado. Parque para disfrutar. Baños y predio en perfecto estado y limpios. Ojalá todas las estaciones fueran así. Atención especial a socios del A.C.A.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach attendants, extremely friendly and well-informed about the route's conditions. Clean restrooms, and tables inside and outside in perfect condition. The park is a great place to enjoy. Restrooms and grounds are in perfect condition and clean. I wish all resorts were like this. Special attention to A.C.A. members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTeV9mSm5BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente tengo que dar un informe muy desfavorable para el bufete del automóvil club argentino de Carmen de areco y me lamento por que la gente de playa y las chicas de mostrador son amables y atienden muy bien pero la cocina deja mucho que desear y adjunto fotos para reportar algo que no se puede dejar pasar que es la falta de higiene en elementos y en la ensalada encontramos los trozos de troncos de tomate y restos de la rayadura de la zanahoria y esto hace que uno quite el voto de confianza dado al sacrificio esfuerzo para atender a socios y clientes del lugar

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, I have to give a very unfavorable report on the buffet at the Argentine Automobile Club in Carmen de Areco. I regret this because, while the beach staff and counter girls are friendly and provide excellent service, the kitchen leaves much to be desired. I've attached photos to report something that cannot be overlooked: the lack of hygiene in the equipment. In the salad, we found pieces of tomato stems and remnants of grated carrot. This causes me to lose the trust I placed in them after their hard work and dedication to serving members and customers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTLWVqSnB3RRAB
